channel.title: wabisebi
channel.description: Japan, language learning and other things

item.title: Blogging like its 2001
item.description:
In 2001, I coded my first website—a site all about Spider-Man comics, something I was into collecting at the time. It was built in HTML, using iframes and everything. Then came a Harry Potter fan site, followed by a website celebrating the newly launched Xbox. it were the early days of the internet and i just registered xbox.net. I received an email from Microsoft at the time, giving me access to the latest news about Xbox, hoping my site would grow. They did not realize I was only twelve at the time. .

Tags: keep-this-tag-format, tags-are-optional, example
item.dc:creator: Seb
